text.title: GitLab Duo Agent Platform Developer Flow Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tracker-gitlab-duo-developer-flow methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: write-duo-flows
step.action: Author `templates/duo-flows.yaml` mapping labels to named flows.

step.name: respect-approvals
step.action: Verify the flow's service account does not have bypass scope.

step.name: enable-audit-log
step.action: Turn on `duo_flow_invocations` audit event; pipe to SIEM if applicable.
